purpose: Stage One Check 10 committed structured execution-log evidence for a fresh EVTX live run.
source_run_note: Raw generated run directories remain gitignored. This packet commits a compact structured trace plus hashes sufficient to spot-check the finding-to-tool-call chain without committing raw evidence.

evidence.public_fixture_note: Small public/staged EVTX fixture used for the live-test matrix row: Security event log cleared. Raw EVTX evidence is not part of this release-evidence packet.

coverage_scope.truth_boundary: If no parser/tool extracts an artifact class, VERDICT cannot reason over it. This manifest records that boundary explicitly.

token_usage.reason: scripts/find_evil_auto.py synthesizes Pool A/Pool B findings deterministically from typed tool outputs for this headless run. No Anthropic/OpenAI/OpenRouter/Groq completion call is made in this path; Claude credentials are checked only during preflight.

contains: ACP handoffs between supervisor, pools, verifier, and judge
report QA and release gate records

scope_limits: This is a compact committed trace, not the raw tmp/auto-runs directory.
The run is a small EVTX live test for execution-log qualification, not the broader NIST/SRL fleet benchmark.
The customer_release_gate trace record is emitted before manifest finalization; this summary records the later manifest_verify.overall=true result.
Report QA remains WARN because ATT&CK blind spots and customer-release signer/expert-signoff requirements are intentionally visible.
